title: HEALTHY FAMILIES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN'S COMMISSION HEALTHY FAMILIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on strengthening the parent-child relationship to assure healthy child growth and development. Home visitors support parents in cultivating and strengthening a nurturing, positive relationship with their baby at each visit. Parents receive information on topics like child development, infant care and keeping their baby healthy, and learning what is going on in their communities to support new families. A trained family support specialist engages with parents to nurture their baby in a safe and healthy environment that encourages learning. 16518 SE River Road Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Families must score positive on the New Baby Questionnare needs assessment and then be enrolled during the prenatal through infant stages (90 days or younger) however once enrolled, children can remain enrolled until 36 months of age. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5:00pm. Evening hours are available for home visits as needed. Email (503) 675-4565 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 675-4565 Main phone Main phone (503) 675-4565 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish or with interpretation services for other languages AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Child Abuse Prevention Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN'S COMMISSION
